name: Mary Commini's Skillet Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except steak and french-fried onions in the skillet.
2. Mix together thoroughly.
3. Cook steaks in the skillet on medium-high heat for seven minutes per side.
4. Top each steak with a portion of french-fried onions.
5. Serve with baked potatoes.
